arts.ttl: Brentford vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: A depleted Tottenham side travel across the capital this Sunday to face Brentford at the Gtech Community Stadium. The Lilywhites dropped to 16th on Saturday after Everton’s resounding 4-0 triumph over Leicester City saw the Toffees overtake Ange Postecoglou’s side. The Australian has had to deal with another casualty as Radu Dragusin could be out […] The post Brentford vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'Here we go': Fabrizio Romano says 'dominant' player is now about to sign for Tottenham
It's absurd to blame Daniel Levy for everything wrong at Spurs - but here's the one change he should make, writes Danny Murphy
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: I don't recognise Levy as the ogre or tyrant he's portrayed as from the chairman I knew when I was at Spurs. Our first conversation came when I turned down Spurs.

arts.ttl: Spurs hijack Danso deal as defender snubs Wolves
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have hijacked a move to sign Lens defender Kevin Danso, despite Wolves seemingly being on the verge of signing the player.

arts.ttl: Tottenham complete stunning transfer hijack over Premier League rivals as problem finally solved
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have reportedly completed a stunning transfer swoop for Lens defender Kevin Danso - pinching the player from under the nose of Premier League rivals Wolverhampton Wanderers. According to Fabrizio Romano, Danso has now'said yes' to Tottenham and his medical at Wolves is set to be cancelled.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'strike agreement' for £4.6m defender as Premier League rivals 'hijacked' at last minute
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur allegedly hijack Wolverhampton Wanderers' move for Lens defender Kevin Danso after being rejected by AC Milan's Fikayo Tomori.
